rewardCards.title: More Reasons to Love Heramba
rewardCards.description: Enjoy exclusive perks designed to make every purchase sweeter.
rewardCards.welcomeGiftDesc: Get $200 off on your very first order when you sign up today.
rewardCards.loyaltyDesc: Earn 1 point per $10 spent. Redeem for discounts on future orders.
rewardCards.referDesc: Share your code with friends. You both get $150 off your next purchase.

testimonials.title: What Our Families Say
testimonials.testimonial1Text: Absolutely love the quality! The organic cotton onesies are so soft on my baby's skin. Will definitely order again.
testimonials.testimonial2Text: Fast delivery and beautiful packaging. It felt like unboxing a gift! The bamboo blanket is our baby's favourite.
testimonials.testimonial3Text: Finally a brand that cares about safety and style. The skincare set is gentle and smells amazing. Highly recommend!

productsPage.title: Our Shop
productsPage.description: Explore our complete collection of safe, organic & lovingly curated products for your little one.
productsPage.loadError: Failed to load products. Please try again later.
productsPage.emptyDescription: Try changing your filters or search query.

aboutPage.heroTitle: Made with Love for Little Ones
aboutPage.heroDescription: We carefully curate safe, high-quality products that bring comfort, care, and happiness to mothers and their little ones.
aboutPage.storyDescription: As parents ourselves, we understand how important it is to choose safe, reliable, and loving products for your child. Our journey began with a simple mission — to make parenting easier and more joyful.
aboutPage.promiseSafeDescription: All products meet strict safety standards for your peace of mind.
aboutPage.promiseSkinDescription: Gentle fabrics and materials suitable for delicate skin.
aboutPage.promiseTrustedDescription: Loved and recommended by thousands of happy moms.
aboutPage.connectionsDescription: Follow us on social media and join our community of loving parents. Share your stories, ask questions, and stay updated on the latest news and promotions.
aboutPage.sidebarDescription: Discover safe, loving essentials designed to make parenting easier and more joyful.

contactPage.title: Contact Us
contactPage.description: Have a question, suggestion or just want to say hello? We'd love to hear from you.
contactPage.formDescription: Fill in the form below and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contactPage.subject: Subject
contactPage.sentSuccess: Message sent successfully! We'll be in touch soon.
contactPage.sendError: Could not send your message. Please try again or email us directly.
contactPage.faq1Answer: We offer hassle-free returns within 15 days of delivery.
contactPage.faq2Answer: Currently we deliver across India. International shipping coming soon!
contactPage.faq3Answer: Yes — we prioritise certified organic, non-toxic materials.
contactPage.followDescription: Stay updated with new arrivals, tips & offers.
